title: [Cairnfang Manor, Dining Room]
description: Crystal chandeliers hang from the ceiling, their positioning perfectly illuminates a trio of flowery tables set about the room.  Blue and green braided throw rugs decorate the polished linden floors, their patterns swirling about creating a fanciful pattern.  Framed by a pair of blooming rose bushes, a swinging door leads out of the dining area.

wayto.30956: ;e table = "Forsythia"; fput "go #{table} table" if dothistimeout("go #{table} table", 25, /You (?:and your group )?head over to|waves.*you.*(?:invites|inviting) you(?: and your group)? to (?:join|come sit at)/) =~ /inviting you|invites you/
